qry:select.name: RSA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion %}) {%? (string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% AND TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp) %}) %} {% AND 1=2 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_SI
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RSB
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#FILTRO:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion %}) {%? (string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% AND TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp) %}) %} {% AND 1=1 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_NO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
